text: A photograph showing the aftermath of a fire or explosion in a residential area. A two-story building on the left is partially damaged, with exposed concrete and a blue garage door. To the right, a single-story wooden structure is heavily damaged, with its roof and walls reduced to charred debris and exposed wooden beams. A man in a blue shirt stands near the damaged building on the left. A motorcycle is parked in front of the debris, and a car is partially visible on the far right. The scene is outdoors under a bright blue sky.
label: Image
